title: elaeocarpus kontumensis
intro: Elaeocarpus kontumensis, also known as the Kontum staff tree or Kontum elephant tree, is a plant species native to Vietnam. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The leaves and bark of the Elaeocarpus kontumensis plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly consumed in traditional medicine practices.
